text: Imagine a tool that not only edits genes but can also spot diseases. CRISPR, famous for gene editing, is being repurposed for diagnostics. Researchers are developing CRISPR systems that detect viruses in minutes. These tests could revolutionize how we address outbreaks, but many are still in early stages. Imagine diagnosing an illness faster than ever, thanks to CRISPR's precision. Curious about the future of biotech? Hit follow for more cutting-edge updates!
